description: ANALYST proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED review of TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 smoke validation results. CLOUD_CODE has completed execution (commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9) and produced governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json confirming: (1) auditor-runner.yml dispatch role filter present (commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5); (2) auditor-runner.yml server-side current_task.json update step gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED present (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae); (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml exists with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing (commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26); (4) governance/ledger/ contains ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema v162 and correct commit SHAs; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for prior P3 tasks. AUDITOR must inspect governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json on main branch, verify all five checks carry pass status, confirm schema_version v164 compliance in ledger trail for this task_id, and emit VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED or VERIFICATION_FAILED accordingly. Successful verification closes the smoke E2E loop and authorises advancement to the next roadmap phase.
